events.name: The Anti-Magic Weapon
events.content: The Anti-Magic Weapon Is used where Aeolus will be built.

events.name: Aeolus is Built
events.content: The crater left by the Anti-Magic Weapon reveals the geothermal spring, and the city of Aeolus is built on it.

events.name: Formation of Aeolia's Government
events.content: Aeolia officially implements it's government, and the first Folds are formed.

events.name: Tane Joins WUC
events.content: WUC Archer unofficially recruits Tane as the first magical member of WUC.

events.name: Learning From The Past
events.content: Tane and WUC Archer propose WUC to the Manifold.

events.name: WUC Is Officialy Formed
events.content: WUC becomes an officially sanctioned project, with full support from the Manifold.
linkedFollowing: WUC Archer and Tane Look for WUC Recruits
WUC Archer and Tane Look for WUC Recruits

events.name: The Doomed Adventurers Fight the Dragon
Rena Forges the Crystal Sword
linkedPrior: The Doomed Adventurers Fight the Dragon

events.name: Valen Starts to Develop Magic Skills
Showstopper
linkedPrior: Valen Starts to Develop Magic Skills

events.name: Tane's Sister Survives
events.content: Tane's sister continues adventuring alone, assuming everyone is dead.

events.name: Valen Survives
events.content: Valen joins Xion's adventuring party, assuming that the others had left him for dead.

events.name: Rena Survives
events.content: Rena restarts her life in Aeolus under a new name, assuming everyone is dead, and joins WUC.

events.name: Recruiting Kuno
events.content: Rena and Tane go to retreive the Crystal sword. Rena and Kuno duel for possesion of the Crystal Sword. Rena wins, and Kuno is invited to join WUC.

events.name: WUC Archer and Tane Look for WUC Recruits
events.content: WUC Archer and Tane travel across Aeolia looking for latent mages, and collecting data on the magic resurgence.

events.name: Sebastian Joins WUC
linkedPrior: WUC Archer and Tane Look for WUC Recruits

events.name: Tane's Sister's Group Stops in the Small Village
Valen Destroys the Small Village
events.content: Valen, as Weltzer, Attacks the Small Village on the Border Between Aeolia and (Formerly) Sev'ren.
linkedPrior: Tane's Sister's Group Stops in the Small Village

events.name: Tane's Sister's is Coerced to Work For the Herals of Entropy
The Small Village is Attacked
events.content: A small village on the border between Aeolia and (Formely)Sev'ren is destroyed and turned almost entirely into Dark Aura.

events.name: WUC Responds to the Village Attack
events.content: WUC go to the remains of the attack site and obtain a sample of Dark Aura.

events.name: Artis Joins WUC
events.content: WUC finds Artis, who has a latent Aura, and they recruit him to join WUC.
linkedPrior: WUC Responds to the Village Attack

events.name: WUC Travels to (Formerly)Sev'reon
events.content: WUC travel via boat to the capital of the country bordering Aeolia, looking for leads about the forces behind the Dark Aura attack.

events.name: Exactly As Planned
events.content: WUC tries to coerce Aster to get them info on the Dark Aura from (Formerly)Sev'reon's palace.

events.name: Aster Kenos Becomes a Junior Auratech
Aster Kenos Becomes the Senior Engineer for (Formerly)Sev'reon's Dome
linkedPrior: Aster Kenos Becomes a Junior Auratech

events.name: Aster Kenos and Daz Become Friends
linkedPrior: Aster Kenos Becomes the Senior Engineer for (Formerly)Sev'reon's Dome

events.name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
events.content: Aster Kenos is "hired" by WUC to investigate the monarchy of (Formerly)Sev'ren in Sev'reon.
linkedPrior: Aster Kenos and Daz Become Friends
